scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "next dev --turbopack" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.electron:build: next build --turbopack && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); if(!process.env.SKIP_DIST_CLEAN&&fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.rmSync('dist', {recursive:true, force:true}); if(fs.existsSync('.next/standalone')) { fs.rmSync('standalone', {recursive:true, force:true}); execSync('cp -RL .next/standalone standalone', {stdio:'inherit'}); fs.mkdirSync('standalone/.next', { recursive: true }); if (fs.existsSync('.next/static')) execSync('cp -RL .next/static standalone/.next/static', {stdio:'inherit'}); if (fs.existsSync('public')) execSync('cp -RL public standalone/public', {stdio:'inherit'}); if (fs.existsSync('standalone/dist')) fs.rmSync('standalone/dist', {recursive:true, force:true}); if (fs.existsSync('.env.local')) { fs.copyFileSync('.env.local', 'standalone/.env.local'); console.log('Copied .env.local into standalone'); } else { console.warn('Warning: .env.local not found - packaged app will not have SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY etc.'); } console.log('Copied standalone + static + public'); } else { console.error('Run next build first'); process.exit(1); }" && electron-builder --publish never
